name: Charles Decroix, dealer
relation: Sold Sauval's forgeries as genuine for twenty years.

name: Renée Boutin, restorer
relation: Sauval had threatened to expose her own forgeries.

name: Aristide Vaillant, collector
relation: Recently learned his prize Vermeer was a Sauval.

name: Yvette Sauval (sister)
relation: Sole heir to the unsold works.

name: Insp. Lambert Caillou
relation: Had taken bribes from Sauval for ten years; now under investigation.
